title: Stale Approval Cleaner
description: Surface all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals sorted by risk level — identify unlimited approvals, deprecated protocol spenders, and dead contracts that should be revoked.
useCase: Build a wallet security dashboard that shows every active token approval grouped by risk (critical/high/medium/safe), with the dollar value at risk and a direct Etherscan revoke link for each.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain to scan approvals on
keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address to audit approvals for
